gt_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.molecule_id) FROM molecule AS T1 INNER JOIN bond AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T2.bond_type = '#' AND T1.label = '-'
